programme.title: Battle Beyond The Stars
programme.desc: Shad of Akir Richard Thomas recruits a space cowboy George Peppard and other warriors to defend his planet from a barbarians army

programme.title: Lion of the Desert
programme.desc: Set during the reign of Mussolini this epic tale revolves around Libyan leader Omar Mukhtar Omar an Arab Muslim rebel takes on the Italian attack which is directed towards conquering Libya

programme.title: Prodigal Boxer 2
programme.desc: Prodigal Boxer 2

programme.title: TBH 218
programme.desc: TBH 218

programme.title: Petticoat Junction S07E10
programme.desc: Petticoat Junction S07E10

programme.title: Lights of Old Sante Fe
programme.desc: In this musical western Marjorie Brooks Dale Evans is the owner and operator of a rodeo thats an antiquated touring company on its last legs Her business rival Frank Madden Richard Powers offers to combine their operations if the lovely Marjorie will be his bride Though she initially rebuffs his proposal a canceled booking tips the scales and forces Marjorie to accept But rodeo rider Roy Rogers Roy Rogers suspects Frank is behind Marjories troubles and sets out to investigate

programme.title: Days of Jesse James
programme.desc: A bank robbery pulled off by the bank officials not the usual James gang

programme.title: Shane
programme.desc: The story revolves around Shane a bounty hunter who helps a family of farmers being harassed by the local goons

programme.title: Under California Stars
programme.desc: Roy a rancher and a movie star returns to his ranch to celebrate a milestone However he soon finds that his horse Trigger has been kidnapped and is being held for ransom

programme.title: Abilene Town
programme.desc: Abilene Town

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: A devious antiques dealer uses a magic lantern to travel back to the Civil War so he can steal artifacts from dead soldiers

programme.title: Demons
programme.desc: A group of random people are invited to a screening of a mysterious movie only to find themselves trapped in the theater with ravenous demons

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A married woman is into watching game shows She gets onto one which becomes a nightmare wherein if she answers correctly her husband dies She wins 1000000 then travels back in time warning herself to get rid of the money or else her husband will die

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: An unattractive and unlucky actor cant get a role because of his looks His agent and girlfriend leave him But he doesnt intend to give up - he wants the role of Hamlet

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A good natured vampire takes a more novel approach to satisfying his blood lust with his chosen undercover employment

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Eager and unscrupulous tabloid newspaper reporter Jane L will go to any length to score a juicy scoop Jane L gets in way over her head when she goes snooping around a remote rural mansion in search of Billy Baltimore a legendary 60s acid rock guitarist who reportedly died twenty years ago

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: International hit woman Jackie Dresser makes a living traveling all over the world and bumping people off for a substantial fee Complications arise when the lonely and love-starved Jackie falls for hunky fitness instructor Johnnie while on vacation in a foreign country

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric tracks Skorzney to a shadowy boatyard and begins to keep a journal He steals a revolver and gets some silver bullets hoping to kill Skorzney to end the curse But Eric is captured by sailors who plan to turn him over to Alamo Joe

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric wounded by Alamo Joe is saved by a young boy fascinated by monsters werewolves in particular But things get hairy when Moms abusive boyfriend starts slapping her and her son around and Eric saves the day

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: Nick secretly investigates a member of Internal Affairs as he searches for the reason behind a fellow officers suicide

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: While Hogan detains a German general during an Allied offensive a Gestapo officer looks into Stalag 13s perfect escape record

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogans latest underground contacts are secretly German spies

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: McHale and The Boys have planned some entertainment for the Base Personnel but Binghamton puts a stop to it and orders McHale and his Crew to ferry him to a Staff Meeting so that he can keep an eye on them But after the 73 is put out of commission by a Japanese plane Binghamton if forced to do some entertaining of his own during a mission to obtain some fuel on a Japanese-held island

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: While trying to impress a pretty Nurse Parker receives several serious blows to his morale and humiliated he puts in for a transfer Then complications arise when McHale The Crew and the Nurse work up a plan to try to help him to regain his self-esteem and change his mind

programme.title: Gomer 230
programme.desc: Gomer 230

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Gomer helps a recruit smuggle his girlfriend into the barracks

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Mr Howell names the other castaways as beneficiaries in his will But he then fears they may be trying to kill him for their inheritance when in reality they are throwing a surprise party for him

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan believes he has become an old man after his hair turns completely white overnight but The Professors solution only makes things worse when his hair completely falls out

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: Amos invites their old neighbors to California for a visit including Lukes old girlfriend Elvira Kate tries to hide her jealousy during the reminiscing of old times

programme.title: Real McCoys
programme.desc: When some of Little Lukes classmates tease and bully him about his hillbilly roots Grandpa steps in to teach them about the perniciousness of prejudice

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: A British scientist is hiding at Maxs apartment

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Maxs archenemy Siegfried wants to defect

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJ wrecks his truck and while Bobbie Sue nurses him back to health BJ reminisces about the many beautiful women in his past

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Mister Ed wins 100 in Wilburs name when he correctly answers a contest question over the telephone Wilbur now has a chance to win 5000 but hes going to need Eds help

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur and Carol head out to Pine Lake Lodge for a little rest and relaxation leaving Ed at home

programme.title: Hell Boats
programme.desc: An American commander serving under the British Royal Navy in 1942 is assigned to blockade the island of Malta and told to formulate a plan to destroy the Nazi arsenal in Sicily

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: Alien glyphs appear on all of Alphas screens Koenig sends an Eagle to investigate The Eagle is lost and the pilot is taken over by a huge alien Space Brain using him as a channel to make the Alphans do its bidding Koenig has to destroy it

programme.title: Android
programme.desc: A strange doctor secretly experiments with androids on his space station His assistant is Max a curious android who wants to see the world and meet a girl Criminals hide on their station and soon violence erupts

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Boss gets Uncle Jesse to enter a contest for a new type of fossil fuel saying that moonshine is the perfect way to cut down on pollution However Boss has more up his sleeve He plans to tip off the authorities and once Jesse is arrested take credit for the idea himself

programme.title: Hercules
programme.desc: Hercules

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: While Boone is haunted by hallucinations of captain Lucas Johnson the Taelon Rhoha is to undergo a experiment of experiencing human emotions

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: The Martians encounter another human disease chicken pox which is crippling their invasion plans They decide by harvesting human brains so they can produce a cure that will put the invasion back on track Harrisons team race against time to stop them completing their project

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: After an eletrical explosion in his lab apparently kills Arcane our arch fiend finds himself on trial in a nightmarish comedy of his crimes against his victims

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: How will Swamp Thing deal with a man who has captured footage of him on film and the deadly creatures released into the swamp

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: An immigrant cigar makers son is accosted by neighborhood bullies and calls the police to put a stop to the harassment The only witness to the incident is Dr Kimble whose face seems oddly familiar to the officers

programme.title: BIg Valley
programme.desc: 25 men have died in a cave-in at the Dutton Mine in which the Barkleys have a 40 interest Heath on his way to meet Nick and investigate the disaster is badly wounded-and mistaken by the vengeful townspeople as an avenging mine payroll robber

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Cheyenne rides into a town looking for a job He runs into a hired killer he knows who tries to kill him but is shot by the local sheriff Once he learns who the man was the sheriff hires Cheyenne to work undercover to find who hired him

programme.title: Young 218
programme.desc: Young 218

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Det Keller goes undercover as an ex-con musician to bust a crooked parole officer and his ring of parolees

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: A prince the absolute ruler of a principality has 15 million which he plans to use for arms to wage war on a neighboring oil-rich country Briggs devises a scheme that involves breaking the bank of the princes casino First the IMF will utilize a computer to take 200000 at roulette That will provide the stake the IMF needs to take the prince at a high-stakes game of baccarat

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday becomes emotionally involved in a rape-murder case of a Japanese-American war widow especially after he sees how beautiful she was and after he finds out that she left a young daughter behind Also there might be a connection with the rape of another woman the previous night Now Friday and Gannon must search for the rapist before he strikes again

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A police officer is shot during a routine stop of a car Friday and Gannon find the driver and passenger and learn they are paroled convicts The police officer cannot remember anything about the shooting event to help convict the two men

programme.title: Solar Crisis
programme.desc: A huge Solar flare is predicted to fry Earth Astronauts must fly to the sun to drop a talking bomb Freddy at the right time so the flare will point somewhere else Giant IXL Corp CEO Teague thinks the flare wont happen and wants the mission to fail so he can buy the planet cheaply while the scare lasts

programme.title: Battletruck
programme.desc: Post World War III futuristic tale of collapsed governments bankrupt countries heralding a new lawless age

programme.title: Stryker
programme.desc: The worlds water supply has dried up due to some sort of apocalypse A beautiful woman holds the secret to where one of the last springs being guarded by a group of Amazons A Road Warrior like crew captures her and tries to make her talk through brutal torture The hero Styrker unites with some of the remaining good guys and the Amazons and frees the woman

programme.title: The Strange and Deadly Occurance

programme.title: The Horror at 37000 Feet

programme.title: Lion of the Desert

programme.title: Mazes and Monsters
programme.desc: Four college students become immersed in fantasy role-playing games causing tragic results; based on Rona Jaffes book

programme.title: Away All Boats
programme.desc: The story of a US Naval ship and its crew in the Pacific from 1943 to 1945

programme.title: The Gladiator
programme.desc: A homicidal maniac is on the loose in Los Angeles killing motorists at random with his death car After losing his brother Jeff to the twisted assassin known as Skull Rick Benton takes it upon himself to hunt down the reckless drivers that fill the streets at night Being a master mechanic Rick spends his time converting his pick-up truck into an armed and dangerous vehicle With speed to take on the fastest car and strength to make sure in a one-on-one situation he will be the only survivor The cops soon find out about the vigilante known only as the Gladiator and do all they can to catch him before his citizens arrests go one step too far

programme.title: Bleav in Panthers
programme.desc: Panthers great, Running Back Jonathan Stewart, is joined by Tobacco Road Sports Radio's Desmond Johnson, and Schuyler Callihan for weekly analysis on the Carolina Panthers!

programme.title: Bleav in Lions
programme.desc: Former Lions All-Pro Glover Quin and 7-time Emmy winner Trevor Thompson break down all the latest buzz around Dan Campbell, Jared Goff, Jahmyr Gibbs, and the Detroit Lions on the Bleav in Lions podcast.

programme.title: Bleav In Bills
programme.desc: Adam Benigni and Sal Maiorana are two of the most experienced reporters in western New York with more than 70 years of experience covering the Buffalo Bills.

programme.title: The Ruffino & Joe Show
programme.desc: Blake Ruffino and Joe DeLeone join forces to talk about the latest in the SEC and College Football

programme.title: Bleav in Bengals
programme.desc: Solomon Wilcots hits the mics to talk Bengals football. After covering the field for the 'Who Dey?' nation

programme.title: Bleav In Commanders
programme.desc: Welcome to the Bleav in Commanders show hosted by former Washington WR Anthony Armstrong and Scott Jackson .We are proud to be a part of the Bleav Podcast Network! We provide insight on the Washington Commanders to the best fan base in the NFL! All content is for the fans, and by the fans. LET’S GO WASHINGTON!

programme.title: Simms Complete
programme.desc: Football is the Simms family business. Join former NFL QB Matt Simms & Super Bowl MVP Phil Simms as they share unique insight on the game they love.

programme.title: The Bucky Brooks Show
programme.desc: Bucky Brooks provides the latest insights on the league, featuring expert opinions, guest appearances, and comprehensive NFL Draft coverage.

programme.title: Bleav in Giants
programme.desc: The broadcast team of commentator Bob Papa and New York Giants legend Carl Banks bring you weekly analysis on your New York Giants.

programme.title: Bleav in Chargers
programme.desc: The greatest fullback in Chargers history Lorenzo Neal hops on the mic with Chargers Play-By-Play Broadcaster Matt "Money" Smith to talk all things Jim Harbaugh, Justin Herbert, and the Los Angeles Chargers.

programme.title: Bleav in Texans
programme.desc: Bleav in Texans is your go-to podcast for everything Houston Texans, hosted by former NFL wide receiver Cecil Shorts III and former defensive tackle and sports radio host Seth Payne.

programme.title: Bleav in Buckeyes
programme.desc: Former Ohio State Football Players Chimdi Chekwa and Bryant Browning talk all things Buckeyes. THE #1 Ohio State Football Podcast out there talking Ryan Day, CJ Stroud, and the rest of the Grey and Scarlet.

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The pupils seek out and find Merlin and hell teach the pupil Presto magic if he stays with Merlin Presto decides to stay and attempts a spell to create a way home but the spell summons dragons instead which attack a nearby village

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The group encounters Sir John a seemingly fearless knight But hes really a coward his village is ready to exile him unless he performs one brave deed Venger captures Sir Johns son and tells him to lead the group into a trap

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Quimby sends Gadget to find the location of MADs school for agents

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget is sent to retrieve a group of Malaysian explorers who are now MADs prisoners

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: Leader-1 turns evil when hes tricked into changing into a fake power suit but Cy-Kills plot backfires when hes deposed by the newly nasty Guardian

programme.title: Challenge of the GoBots
programme.desc: The Renegades and the Guardians compete to be the recipients of an ancient aliens vast store of knowledge Show Challenge of The GoBots

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Bubblecrafts rise out of the waters Bubblemen are directed by Brotak to kidnap Zandor and TaraAndropon sends his robots to attack the Herculoids only to be defeated Zandor accepts his challenge as he sends his best warrior Ogron

programme.title: Jayce and the Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: The root which only responds to Audric or something belonging to him reacts to the Planet Xiang which leads Jayce and Herc there even though it is a planet controlled by Saw Boss They discover a message from Audric on a vase but before they can get it it is stolen Jayce and Herc and Oon are drawn further into the city where Saw Boss has laid a trap for Jayce Jayce and Oon fall into a pit which is slowly being consumed by fire; but Herc Gillian and Flora come to the rescue Safely aboard the Pride they decode the message which is revealed to be too old to be of much use

programme.title: Jayce and the Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Gillian tells the story of Valroth a powerful weapons maker who made living armor to protect his people many years ago But the armor became too powerful and it was all destroyed except for the helmet Jayce seeks the helmet finds it and after putting it on his power is invincible He easily defeats some monster minds But the helmet is wicked and it takes over Jayces body Jayce and the power of light conquer the evil helmet and then they destroy it

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: The Statue of Liberty fails to reappear during Wondros magic act and ends up in a field in Iowa But VENOM has further plans to hold Lady Liberty for ransom

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: Scott and T-Bob find the treasure of Brian Boru at the end of an Irish rainbow but VENOM soon finds out and tries to get it for themselves

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: Clash! The Old Red Enemy

programme.title: Teknoman
programme.desc: Blade and Darkon fight in a final battle to determine Earths future

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Kevin Keene and his dog Duke have been transported to Video Land and asked to help defeat Mother Brain After Princess Lana is kidnapped Kevin and his video game companions Mega-Man Kid Icarus and Simon Belmont have to work together to save her or else Mother Brain just might be able to take over Video Land and rule forever

programme.title: Captain N The Game Master
programme.desc: Mother Brain makes a discovery that Kevin isnt very good at the Bayou Billy video game So she sets a trap to lure him into Bayouland
